message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "：读者" as Reader
actor "：图书管理员" as Librarian
participant "还书界面" as UI
participant "：还书信息" as ReturnInfo
participant "：系统" as System

loop
  Reader -> Librarian : 1.取消预定
  activate Librarian

  Librarian -> UI : 2.处理图书
  activate UI

  UI -> ReturnInfo : 3.获取图书信息
  activate ReturnInfo
  ReturnInfo --> UI : 4.图书信息
  deactivate ReturnInfo

  UI -> System : 5.删除预定记录
  activate System
  System -> System : 6.删除预定记录
  System --> UI : 7.删除预定成功
  deactivate System

  UI --> Librarian : 8.处理图成功
  deactivate UI

  Librarian --> Reader : 9.取消预定成功
  deactivate Librarian
end
@enduml
